ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the study abroad program */,
  "academic_unit" TEXT /* Academic unit responsible for the program */,
  "director" TEXT /* Program director's name */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., proposed, approved, pending) */,
  "proposal_due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting the program proposal */,
  "approval_due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for final approval of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_location" TEXT /* Location where the program will take place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Estimated budget for the program */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can participate in the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_timeline" (
  "timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Name of the milestone (e.g., Background Information Form, Program Proposal, Final Approval) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for completing the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., completed, pending, overdue) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the milestone */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who completed the milestone */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_timeline_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., Program Director, Academic Unit, OGE) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* The name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* The type of the document (e.g., proposal, background form, approval) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* The URL or file path to the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the communication belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the communication */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* The content of the communication */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the communication was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
